---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new capability for the infra, data-plane, scripts, or CI layer.
title: "feat: <short summary>"
labels: ["enhancement", "triage"]
---

## Plane and scope

- [ ] `infra/**` (control plane)
- [ ] `data-plane/**` (data plane)
- [ ] `scripts/**`
- [ ] `.github/workflows/**`
- [ ] `.github/instructions/**`, `.github/prompts/**`, `.github/agents/**` (Copilot customization)
- [ ] `docs/**` or `README.md`

## Problem

<!-- What user-facing outcome is missing today? -->

## Proposed change

<!-- One or two paragraphs. Cite Microsoft Learn for any new resource type, cmdlet, az command, REST endpoint, or action version. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you look at, and why is this better? -->

## Out of scope

<!-- Explicitly list what this proposal does NOT do, so reviewers can right-size the PR. -->

## Destructive?

- [ ] Implementation would delete, prune, or overwrite existing Purview state (collection, term, classification, source, scan, policy, role assignment).

<!-- If ticked, the implementing PR must carry the `destructive` label per .github/instructions/pre-commit.instructions.md. -->
